Areas We Serve Across Coimbatore

Covai Accounting Services works with businesses and individuals in every part of Coimbatore — from the central business districts to the city’s fast-growing IT and industrial suburbs.

20 featured localities

Popular Coimbatore areas we serve

RS Puram

a commercial and residential locality known for D.B. Road’s retail stretch and a dense concentration of traders and professionals.

Services in RS Puram →

Gandhipuram

Coimbatore’s central business hub around the bus stand, home to wholesalers, textile traders and small businesses that need fast-turnaround compliance.

Services in Gandhipuram →

Peelamedu

an education and IT corridor near CODISSIA and Avinashi Road, with engineering firms, colleges and a growing base of professional-services clients.

Services in Peelamedu →

Saibaba Colony

a well-established residential and commercial locality on the west side of the city, popular with retail businesses and salaried professionals.

Services in Saibaba Colony →

Ramanathapuram

a mixed residential-commercial area along Trichy Road with a strong base of small traders and transport-linked businesses.

Services in Ramanathapuram →

Singanallur

an industrial and residential zone on Trichy Road, home to manufacturing units, warehouses and growing MSME clusters.

Services in Singanallur →

Saravanampatti

Coimbatore’s fastest-growing IT and startup corridor, with software companies and new-age businesses needing incorporation and payroll support.

Services in Saravanampatti →

Vadavalli

our home locality on Maruthamalai Main Road — a residential and educational hub where our office has served clients since 2012.

Services in Vadavalli →

Ganapathy

a residential and small-business locality in north Coimbatore with strong demand for GST and income tax filing services.

Services in Ganapathy →

Thudiyalur

a growing suburb on the northern edge of the city with expanding residential development and new small businesses.

Services in Thudiyalur →

Podanur

a railway junction town with a long-established trading community and logistics-linked businesses.

Services in Podanur →

Sulur

an industrial belt near the Air Force Station with manufacturing units, warehousing and MSME clusters.

Services in Sulur →

Kuniyamuthur

a residential and small-industry locality in south Coimbatore along the Coimbatore–Pollachi stretch.

Services in Kuniyamuthur →

Kovaipudur

a quieter, foothill residential locality with a growing number of professionals and small business owners.

Services in Kovaipudur →

Race Course

one of Coimbatore’s most established commercial and residential addresses, home to corporate offices and high-street businesses.

Services in Race Course →

Avinashi Road

the city’s primary commercial corridor — hotels, showrooms, IT parks and corporate offices line this stretch toward the airport.

Services in Avinashi Road →

Ondipudur

an industrial and warehousing zone near the railway goods yard, with manufacturing and logistics businesses.

Services in Ondipudur →

Kalapatti

an emerging residential and small-industrial locality near Saravanampatti, popular with new businesses and young professionals.

Services in Kalapatti →

Vilankurichi

a locality bridging Peelamedu and Saravanampatti, with a mix of residential apartments and small commercial establishments.

Services in Vilankurichi →

Neelambur

a fast-developing residential suburb on Sathyamangalam Road with a rising number of first-time business registrations.

Services in Neelambur →
Full coverage

And every other Coimbatore neighbourhood

Beyond the localities featured above, we regularly serve clients in these areas too — and anywhere else within Coimbatore city and its surrounding taluks.

UkkadamTown HallSelvapuramSundarapuramSitraChinnavedampattiKavundampalayamMadukkaraiPerurThondamuthurEachanariKurichiKaniyurIrugurKaramadaiAnaimalayan ChatramMalumichampattiVellaloreHopes CollegeChintamani NagarRamnagarBharathi ParkVadavalli BypassMarudhamalaiChettipalayamSomayampalayamNanjundapuramK.K. PudurUppilipalayamKattoorKurudampalayamTelungupalayam

Frequently asked questions

Do I need to visit your Vadavalli office in person?

No — most clients across Coimbatore work with us entirely over phone, WhatsApp and email. In-person visits are entirely optional and mainly used for document signing or a first meeting, if you prefer it.

Do you charge extra for clients outside Vadavalli?

No. Our pricing is the same across every locality in Coimbatore — RS Puram, Peelamedu, Saravanampatti or anywhere else in the city.

I’m in an area not listed here — can you still help?

Yes. We serve all of Coimbatore, including localities like Ukkadam, Town Hall, Selvapuram, Sundarapuram, Sitra, Chinnavedampatti and every other neighbourhood in the city, even where we haven’t built a dedicated page yet.

Our office

352, Mullai Nagar, Opp. Vallalar Hospital, Maruthamalai Main Road, Vadavalli, Coimbatore – 641041

Mon – Sat, 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM
